approaches.rationale: nlohmann/json is a header-only C++ library; gazelle_cc can generate cc_library targets from the include tree, giving a fine-grained source-native port of the public headers.
approaches.module_bazel:
module(
    name = "nlohmann_json",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle_cc", version = "0.6.0")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")

# Hermetic-ish C/C++ toolchain registration is handled by rules_cc's
# auto-detected toolchain; pin rules_cc for reproducibility.
approaches.root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle")
load("@gazelle_cc//:def.bzl", "DEFAULT_LANGUAGES")

# gazelle:exclude docs
# gazelle:exclude tests
# gazelle:exclude tools
# gazelle:exclude benchmarks
# gazelle:exclude cmake
# gazelle:exclude single_include

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = "@gazelle_cc//:gazelle_cc",
)
anticipated_risks: header-only library may yield empty/odd cc_library since no .cpp sources
gazelle_cc include resolution for nested nlohmann/ paths

approaches.rationale: The project ships a mature CMakeLists.txt; wrapping it with rules_foreign_cc's cmake rule builds/installs the library headers via the project's own build system as a single coarse Bazel target.
approaches.module_bazel:
module(
    name = "nlohmann_json",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_foreign_cc", version = "0.15.1")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")

foreign_cc_deps = use_extension("@rules_foreign_cc//foreign_cc:extensions.bzl", "tools")
approaches.root_build:
load("@rules_foreign_cc//foreign_cc:defs.bzl", "cmake")

filegroup(
    name = "all_srcs",
    srcs = glob(
        ["**"],
        exclude = ["bazel-*/**", "BUILD.bazel", "MODULE.bazel"],
    ),
)

cmake(
    name = "nlohmann_json",
    cache_entries = {
        "JSON_BuildTests": "OFF",
        "JSON_Install": "ON",
    },
    lib_source = ":all_srcs",
    out_headers_only = True,
    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
)
anticipated_risks: rules_foreign_cc requires host cmake/make tools registered
cmake cache flags must match project options
